sourceMovie.title: The Idea of You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Idea of You works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: About a Boy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Idea of You clicked for you, About a Boy (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Idea of You?
faq.answer: Try About a Boy, The Diary of a Teenage Girl, Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy—each shares DNA with The Idea of You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Idea of You?
faq.answer: The Idea of You (2024) is best described as Romance, Drama, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Idea of You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
